title: LarkTheOcto's Fabric Pack
description: A spiritual successor/update of Ragnarsson Fabric Pack from Curseforge, now on Modrinth and for Minecraft 1.20.2
body:
Heyas! I am Lark The Octo Plays (formerly known as DRG Gaming) and this modpack is intented to be an update of my Curseforge modpack, Ragnarsson Fabric Pack.

Not only is this updated to Minecraft 1.20.2, the list of mods has also changed quite a bit.

Important things to note:

-When you spawn in Singleplayer, you automatically gain "operator rights", even when you don't enable cheats during world creation.

-Content from Parzi's Star Wars mod is only accessible through spawning it in using JEI (ctrl+click the wrench icon next to the search bar to toggle cheat mode)

-Custom HUD elements are provided by EssentialsHUD

-Custom Dimension, Starry Skies, is accessible by building a Nether Portal out of Packed Ice and lighting it with Flint 'n' Steel. Be mindful that the first planet you start in is not necessarily a 'wood' planet

-World Gen is provided by Terralith, and a few custom structure mods are provided as well

-The pack comes with custom 'default' keybinds, but feel free to change them as you see fit

-Endermen don't get angry if you look at them and Phantoms are not hostile

-Mobs always deal damage equal to 'Normal' difficulty regardless of settings

The early versions of this pack should be considered "work in progress", at least until the Star wars mod gets updated to the point where its content is accessible in survival


#AD
